title: IELTS Academic Reading: The Impact of Climate Change on Marine Ecology
passage: Rising ocean temperatures and acidification are significantly disrupting marine ecosystems globally. Academic research indicates that coral reefs, which support a quarter of all marine life, are undergoing severe bleaching events. If current emission rates fluctuate without mitigation policies, marine biodiversity will face irreversible degradation. Protecting these resources requires immediate international protocols.
translation: Kenaikan suhu samudra dan pengasaman secara signifikan mengganggu ekosistem laut secara global.

questions.question: What is the primary effect of rising ocean temperatures on coral reefs?
What fraction of marine life do coral reefs support?
What does the passage suggest is needed to protect marine resources?

title: IELTS Academic Reading: The History of Artificial Intelligence
passage: The concept of artificial intelligence dates back to antiquity. However, modern AI began in 1956 at the Dartmouth workshop. Although funding collapsed during the AI winters, deep learning and big data in the 21st century propelled AI into a dominant industry force.
translation: Kecerdasan buatan modern dimulai tahun 1956 di Dartmouth.

questions.question: When did modern artificial intelligence begin?
What revived AI research in the 21st century?
What were the AI winters characterized by?

title: IELTS Academic Reading: Urban Migration and Social Inequality
passage: The rapid urbanization of developing nations has created significant social stratification. Rural migrants face systemic barriers including inadequate housing and limited healthcare access. Without structural reforms in urban planning, inequalities will perpetuate cycles of poverty undermining national development.
translation: Urbanisasi cepat menciptakan stratifikasi sosial. Tanpa reformasi struktural, ketimpangan memperparah kemiskinan.

questions.question: What is the main challenge faced by rural migrants in cities?
options: Systemic barriers like housing and healthcare

questions.question: What do sociologists recommend to address urban inequality?
What is the likely long-term consequence of unchecked urban inequality?
options: Cycles of poverty harming national development

title: IELTS Academic Reading: The Psychology of Learning
passage: Spaced repetition, reviewing material at increasing intervals, has been consistently shown to outperform massed practice. Cognitive load theory suggests presenting information in manageable chunks reduces working memory strain. Modern language apps incorporate both principles to accelerate vocabulary acquisition.
translation: Pengulangan berjarak lebih efektif daripada belajar massed. Teori beban kognitif menyarankan penyajian informasi dalam potongan kecil.

questions.question: Which technique outperforms massed practice?
What does cognitive load theory recommend?
How do modern language apps incorporate learning principles?
options: By accelerating vocabulary acquisition using both principles

title: IELTS Academic Reading: Renewable Energy Transitions
passage: Solar and wind power costs have fallen dramatically. However, the intermittent nature poses grid stability challenges. Energy storage technologies, particularly lithium-ion batteries and hydrogen fuel cells, are crucial. Governments implement feed-in tariff schemes and carbon taxation to encourage investment in clean energy.
translation: Biaya solar dan angin turun dramatis. Tantangan stabilitas jaringan diatasi melalui teknologi penyimpanan energi.

questions.question: What challenge do intermittent renewable energy sources pose?
Which technologies manage energy supply variability?
options: Lithium-ion batteries and hydrogen fuel cells

questions.question: What policies encourage private investment in clean energy?
options: Feed-in tariff schemes and carbon taxation

title: IELTS Academic Reading: Biodiversity and Ecosystem Services
passage: Biodiversity underpins the stability and productivity of ecosystems. Diverse ecological communities exhibit greater resilience to drought, disease, and temperature fluctuations. Ecosystem services including water purification, pollination, and carbon sequestration are linked to species richness. Current extinction rates threaten the life-support systems human civilization depends upon.
translation: Keanekaragaman hayati mendukung stabilitas ekosistem. Tingkat kepunahan saat ini mengancam sistem penopang kehidupan.

questions.question: What does greater biodiversity provide to ecosystems?
Which is NOT mentioned as an ecosystem service?
What do conservation biologists warn about extinction rates?
options: They threaten human civilization life-support systems

title: IELTS Academic Reading: Digital Transformation in Healthcare
passage: Electronic health records, telemedicine, and AI-driven diagnostic tools enable more accurate diagnoses. Wearable technology allows continuous health monitoring outside clinical settings. However, data privacy, cybersecurity vulnerabilities, and the digital divide remain significant policy challenges.
translation: Teknologi digital merevolusi perawatan kesehatan. Privasi data dan kesenjangan digital tetap menjadi tantangan.

questions.question: How are AI-driven diagnostic tools contributing to healthcare?
What benefit does wearable technology provide?
options: Continuous health monitoring outside clinical settings

questions.question: What concern is raised about digital healthcare transformation?

title: IELTS Academic Reading: The Economics of Education
passage: Economists view education as a human capital investment yielding private and social returns. Higher education graduates earn significantly more, contributing to greater tax revenues. Nations with high educational attainment consistently demonstrate stronger economic growth and lower crime rates. Despite this, access remains inequitable due to income, geography, and gender barriers.
translation: Pendidikan merupakan investasi modal manusia. Negara dengan tingkat pendidikan tinggi menunjukkan pertumbuhan ekonomi lebih kuat.

questions.question: How do economists categorize education?
What is consistently seen in nations with high educational attainment?
options: Stronger economic growth and lower crime

questions.question: What are mentioned as persistent barriers to educational access?

title: IELTS Academic Reading: Space Exploration and Its Benefits
passage: Private companies have dramatically reduced launch costs through reusable rocket technology. Space missions generate valuable scientific data about Earth climate and geological history. Satellite technologies enable global communications networks, GPS navigation, and agricultural monitoring systems benefiting terrestrial populations.
translation: Eksplorasi luar angkasa kini memasuki era komersial dengan roket yang dapat digunakan ulang dan teknologi satelit yang bermanfaat bagi Bumi.

questions.question: What has dramatically reduced space launch costs?
Which terrestrial system benefits from satellite technology?
What valuable information do space missions generate about Earth?

title: IELTS Academic Reading: Food Security in the 21st Century
passage: Global food security faces challenges from climate variability, population growth, and resource degradation. Scientists are developing drought-resistant crops and precision farming. Food waste accounts for approximately one-third of global production. International organizations advocate integrated strategies combining technology, policy reform, and behavioral change.
translation: Ketahanan pangan global menghadapi tantangan dari perubahan iklim. Pemborosan makanan mencapai sepertiga produksi global.

questions.question: What fraction of global food production is wasted?
Which farming innovations are mentioned as solutions?
What approach do international organizations advocate?
options: Integrated strategies combining technology, policy, and behavior

title: IELTS Academic Reading: The Future of Work
passage: Automation and AI are reshaping labor markets. Routine cognitive and physical tasks are increasingly performed by machines in manufacturing and service industries. The World Economic Forum predicts that critical thinking, creativity, and emotional intelligence will become increasingly valuable, emphasizing the need for adaptive educational systems to reskill the workforce.
translation: Otomasi dan AI mengubah pasar kerja. Keterampilan berpikir kritis dan kreativitas akan semakin bernilai.

questions.question: What types of tasks are increasingly performed by machines?
Which skills will become more valuable according to World Economic Forum?
options: Critical thinking, creativity, and emotional intelligence

questions.question: What debate exists among labor economists?
options: Whether technological unemployment will be offset by new jobs

title: IELTS Academic Reading: Language Acquisition Theory
passage: Noam Chomsky proposed that humans possess an innate language acquisition device through Universal Grammar. Usage-based theories argue that language emerges from exposure and interaction. Bilingual research suggests that early exposure to multiple languages enhances cognitive flexibility, executive function, and even delays dementia onset.
translation: Hipotesis Universal Grammar mengusulkan perangkat bawaan. Penelitian bilingual menunjukkan manfaat kognitif dari paparan bahasa ganda.

questions.question: What does Chomsky Universal Grammar hypothesis propose?
options: Humans have an innate language acquisition device

questions.question: What benefit of bilingualism is mentioned?
options: Enhanced cognitive flexibility and delayed dementia

questions.question: What does bilingual research imply for educational policy?
